title: Built-up area in Addis Ababa has more than tripled in the last five decades
subtitle: Built-up area (km²) and population of Addis Ababa, 1975–2025
source: Pesaresi et al. (2024). Advances on the Global Human Settlement Layer by joint assessment of Earth Observation and population survey data. International Journal of Digital Earth, 17(1).
textParagraph: In 1975, Addis Ababa had nearly 39 square kilometers of built-up area. By 2025, it had grown to 128 square kilometers.[reference: ghsl]
visdescription: This chart has two parts. One part shows the map of Addis Ababa and the built-up area over time with a time slider. The other part of the chart shows the growth in population in this city over the same time period with a line chart.

scenes.text: Built-up area in Addis Ababa has more than tripled since the 1970s.
Population growth tracks the expansion of the built-up footprint.
